findings.criterion: DPP identity must include GTIN, batch or lot number, and serial number.
findings.recommended_action: Complete identity fields before DPP publication.

findings.criterion: Mandatory data product metadata must be visible for curated product records.
findings.recommended_action: Attach owner, domain, source, lineage, classification, and certification metadata.

findings.criterion: Environmental readiness requires material or footprint evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Request environmental declaration or footprint evidence from data-layer evidence intake.

findings.criterion: Electrical or building automation products need EMC or electrical test evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Map EMC and electrical evidence to the applicable product family and market.

assumptions: Only applies when the product is connected or software-controlled.
findings.criterion: Connected products require SBOM and secure update evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Provide SBOM and secure update process evidence for connected products.

findings.criterion: Wireless products require radio module and qualification evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Attach wireless module and regional radio evidence when wireless protocol is present.

findings.criterion: Telemetry or customer data processing requires privacy evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Add privacy assessment, retention, deletion, and access logging evidence.

findings.criterion: Mechanical review requires housing, assembly, or serviceability evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Link CAD or assembly evidence and service instructions.

findings.criterion: Aftermarket readiness requires spare parts or repair instruction evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Request spare parts list and repair instructions for lifecycle support.

findings.criterion: Market claims should have evidence and commercial classification.
findings.recommended_action: Attach market claim evidence and confirm commercial sensitivity.

workflow_feedback.data_layer_write_policy: raw evidence is not mutated; missing evidence is routed as a finding
workflow_feedback.product_layer_write_policy: advisory output only; product master and DPP updates require human review

findings.recommended_action: Request spare parts list and repair instructions for lifecycle support.

findings.criterion: Market claims should have evidence and commercial classification.
findings.recommended_action: Attach market claim evidence and confirm commercial sensitivity.

workflow_feedback.data_layer_write_policy: raw evidence is not mutated; missing evidence is routed as a finding
workflow_feedback.product_layer_write_policy: advisory output only; product master and DPP updates require human review

findings.criterion: DPP identity must include GTIN, batch or lot number, and serial number.
findings.recommended_action: Complete identity fields before DPP publication.

findings.criterion: Mandatory data product metadata must be visible for curated product records.
findings.recommended_action: Attach owner, domain, source, lineage, classification, and certification metadata.

findings.criterion: Environmental readiness requires material or footprint evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Request environmental declaration or footprint evidence from data-layer evidence intake.

findings.criterion: Electrical or building automation products need EMC or electrical test evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Map EMC and electrical evidence to the applicable product family and market.

assumptions: Only applies when the product is connected or software-controlled.
findings.criterion: Connected products require SBOM and secure update evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Provide SBOM and secure update process evidence for connected products.

findings.criterion: Wireless products require radio module and qualification evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Attach wireless module and regional radio evidence when wireless protocol is present.

findings.criterion: Telemetry or customer data processing requires privacy evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Add privacy assessment, retention, deletion, and access logging evidence.

findings.criterion: Mechanical review requires housing, assembly, or serviceability evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Link CAD or assembly evidence and service instructions.

findings.criterion: Aftermarket readiness requires spare parts or repair instruction evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Request spare parts list and repair instructions for lifecycle support.

findings.criterion: Market claims should have evidence and commercial classification.
findings.recommended_action: Attach market claim evidence and confirm commercial sensitivity.

workflow_feedback.data_layer_write_policy: raw evidence is not mutated; missing evidence is routed as a finding
workflow_feedback.product_layer_write_policy: advisory output only; product master and DPP updates require human review
